name: rendis--opcode
description: Zero-token execution layer for AI agents. Define workflows once, run them free forever — persistent, scheduled, deterministic. 6 MCP tools over SSE. Supports DAG-based execution, 6 step types (action, condition, loop, parallel, wait, reasoning), 26 built-in actions, ${{}} interpolation, reasoning nodes for human-in-the-loop decisions, and secret vault. Use when defining workflows, running templates, checking status, sending signals, querying workflow history, or visualizing DAGs.
